font-family.$description: Font size for H2 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

font-size.$description: Font size for H2 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

font-weight.$description: Font weight for H2 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

line-height.$description: Line height for H2 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

letter-spacing.$description: Tracking for H2 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

measure.$description: Maximum width for H2 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

spacing-before.$description: Amount of margin inline start for H2 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

spacing-after.$description: Amount of margin inline end for H2 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

color.$description: Color of H2 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

font-style.$description: Font style for H2 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

text-transform.$description: Text transform for H2 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.
